mrp_clause_text: calculation of the Grid Reference Rate shall only be based on the charges levied and the kWh invoiced related to consumption between 6am and 6pm. VAT and any demand charge savings associated with the System are excluded from the calculation of the Grid Reference Price. No less than 15 days prior to the annual anniversary of each Operating Year, the Buyer shall provide the Seller with its electric utility invoices (the "Utility Reference Invoices") for the preceeding 12 month period. If the Utility Reference Invoices are not provided to the Seller by such date, the Seller shall be entitled to use publicly available sources to reach a reasonable estimate of the Grid Reference Price. If by reason of changes to the presentation or categorization of component charges the Utility Reference Invoices are no longer an adequate and reasonable means for ascertaining variable charges levied by the Utility, either Party may refer its determination to an Expert Dispute if the Parties do not agree on an appropriate Grid Reference Price. Upon receipt of the Utility Reference Invoices from the Buyer, the Seller shall provide the Buyer with its calculation of the Grid Reference Price for the subsequent Operating Year. This shall occur no later than 30 days after the beginning of the relevant Operating Year. Generator Reference Price = Equal to the product of: (i) the diesel fuel price (derived from the Diesel Reference Bills, as defined below, and specified in Naira/litre); (ii) the average diesel genset efficiency, which for all years of the Agreement will be pegged at a value of 0.28 litres/kWh; and (iii) the surcharge accounting for non-fuel diesel power expenses that are also avoided / reduced via operation of the Solar Facility (including operations & maintenance and wear & tear of the asset), which for all years of the Agreement will be equivalent to a factor of 1.10. No less than 15 days prior to the annual anniversary of each Operating Year, the Buyer shall provide the Seller with all invoices (the "Diesel Reference Invoices") for direct fuel costs incurred by the Generator Equipment for the preceeding 12 month period. If the Diesel Reference Invoices are not provided to the Seller by such date, the Seller shall be entitled to use publicly available sources to reach a reasonable estimate of the Generator Reference Price. If by reason of changes to the presentation or categorization of component charges the Diesel Reference Invoices provided are no longer an adequate and reasonable means for ascertaining the Generator Reference Price, either Party may refer its determination to an Expert Dispute if the Parties do not agree on an appropriate Generator Reference Price. Upon receipt of the Diesel Reference Invoices aforementioned invoices from the Buyer, the Seller shall provide the Buyer with its calculation of the Generator Reference Price for the subsequent Operating Year. This shall occur no later than 30 days after the beginning of the relevant Operating Year.
notes: This is a blended approach with both grid reference price (based on utility charges between 6am-6pm excluding VAT and demand charges) and generator reference price (based on diesel fuel costs with 0.28 litres/kWh efficiency and 1.10 multiplier for non-fuel costs). Currency appears to be Nigerian Naira based on 'Naira/litre' reference for diesel pricing.
